meaning: n.[植] 荜澄茄,<美>含有荜澄茄粉的药用香烟(用于治疗粘膜炎)
examples: AIM: To study antiasthmatic effect of citral from aqueous extract of fruit of cubeb litsea tree and its mechanism.
In another example, if [CubeB]. [Time] has instead the members 2007 and 2008_1, then the virtual cube in the previous example has the members 2007, 2008, 2008_1 and 2009.
A query against 2007 returns data from its parent cube [CubeB], and a query against the merged member 2008 returns the results from both [CubeA] and [CubeB] according to the merge operator.
